failure_signature: - c.Skip("exhaustive types test, skip race test")
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it asserted an exact plan/EXPLAIN output that can vary between runs. Exact plan/EXPLAIN assertions are brittle when optimizer choices can vary. This PR stabilizes it by: planner/core: migrate test-infra to testify for prepare_test.go.
fix_pattern: planner/core: migrate test-infra to testify for prepare_test.go

evidence: evidence: - c.Skip("exhaustive types test, skip race test")
